texto: Maryanne Burkhard and I have set up a B W Wrighthard profile on Goodreads. If any of you would like to friend us there, we would really appreciate it. And if you're feeling really generous and would like to review one or both of our books, we would be eternally grateful! We hope to do some fun things on there once we figure it all out. Thanks for your help and support!!!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a B W Wrighthard: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a gratidao. O trecho “Maryanne Burkhard and I have set up a B W Wrighthard profile on Goodreads. If any of you would li…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, cozy-mystery, fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e fiction.
